channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Ariana and the Elder Codex for PC launches April 29
item.content:encoded:
• PC

One month after the console versions.

Side-scrolling action RPG Ariana and the Elder Codex will launch for PC via Steam on April 29, publisher Idea Factory International announced.

As previously announced, the game will launch both physically and digitally for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch on March 24 in the west.

Ariana and the Elder Codex first launched for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, and Switch on August 21, 2025 in Japan.

Here is an overview of the game, via Idea Factory International:

About

The Librarian Ariana’s mission is to repair the Seven Hero Codices, which have been altered. Due to the terrible damages, magic has vanished from the world.

By utilizing special Librarian magic that allows her to enter Codices, Ariana seeks to mend the books to bring back magic. Can Ariana safely repair each tome and unravel the mysteries hidden within the Library?

Key Features

  • Restore the Books, Reclaim the Magic – Venture into the Seven Hero Codices as Ariana, defeating enemies to earn new Magic Spells and Skills that grant access to previously unreachable areas. Restore Repair Points by taking on platforming and combat challenges that put your abilities to the test. Clear Repair Points as quickly as possible for permanent HP boosts and more!
  • Librarian Magic Materializes – With over 30 unlockable Magic Spells and Skills, mix and match abilities across six slots as you embark on your journey to repair the altered Codices. Experiment with different combinations to discover what best suits your playstyle.
  • Clash With the Guardians of the Altered Codices – Face formidable bosses, each with a devastating arsenal that will test your combat and platforming skills. Dodge spells, time your attacks, and stay on top of your health to prevail.
  • Harness the Power of Magic Items – Mitigate challenges by unlocking, crafting, and equipping Magic Items to boost stats and gain buffs such as elemental boosts, increased critical hits, reduced knockback, and more!


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/ariana-and-the-elder-codex-for-pc-launches-april-29
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Danganronpa 2×2 English voice cast announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

The Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair English voice cast returns.

Spike Chunsoft has announced the English voice cast for Danganronpa 2×2, confirming that the original English voice cast from Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair will return.

Danganronpa 2×2 is a high-speed deductive action game that features both a brand-new scenario, as well as the freshly revamped original scenario from Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair.

The English voice cast is as follows:

  • Monokuma (voiced by Brian Beacock)
  • Monomi (voiced by Rebecca Forstadt)
  • Hajime Hinata (voiced by Johnny Yong Bosch)
  • Nagito Komaeda (voiced by Bryce Papenbrook)
  • Gundham Tanaka (voiced by Chris Tergliafera)
  • Kazuichi Soda (voiced by Kyle Hebert)
  • Byakuya Togami (voiced by Jason Wishnov)
  • Teruteru Hanamura (voiced by Todd Haberkorn)
  • Nekomaru Nidai (voiced by Patrick Seitz)
  • Fuyuhiko Kuzuryu (voiced by Derek Stephen Prince)
  • Akane Owari (voiced by Wendee Lee)
  • Chiaki Nanami (voiced by Christine Marie Cabanos)
  • Sonia Nevermind (voiced by Natalie Hoover)
  • Hiyoko Saionji (voiced by Kira Buckland)
  • Mahiru Koizumi (voiced by Carrie Keranen)
  • Mikan Tsumiki (voiced by Stephanie Sheh)
  • Ibuki Mioda (voiced by Julie Ann Taylor)
  • Peko Pekoyama (voiced by Janice Kawaye)

Danganronpa 2×2 is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam in 2026.

Watch a new trailer below.

English Voice Cast Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/danganronpa-2x2-english-voice-cast-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Abyssus coming to PS5, Xbox Series this summer alongside version 1.3 update
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Physical "Brine Edition" also available for PlayStation 5.

Publisher The Arcade Crew and developer DoubleMoose will release brinepunk cooperative first-person shooter Abyssus for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series this summer alongside the game’s version 1.3 update, the companies announced. A physical “Brine Edition,” including the base game and four cosmetic downloadable contents, will also be available for PlayStation 5 via distributor Silver Lining Entertainment.

Abyssus first launched for PC via Steam on August 12, 2025.

Here are the latest details:

Abyssus, the brinepunk roguelike coop first-person shooter, is coming to PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series this summer—and it’s launching with full cross-play across all platforms!

For the first time, console players will descend into the depths alongside PC players, with seamless cross-platform multiplayer support at launch. Whether you’re on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, or Steam, you’ll be able to squad up in one-to-four-player online cooperative play and take on the corrupted forces lurking within a long-forgotten underwater civilization.

Brinehunters who want the full Abyssus experience can pre-order a brand-new PlayStation 5 physical edition coming this summer. This physical edition includes all currently available cosmetic downloadable content in Abyssus.

The new version 1.3 update will be launching alongside the new PlayStation and Xbox versions of Abyssus and will be expanding your undersea adventure… and arsenal, with a host of new content at absolutely no cost:

  • A new God will be joining the lineup, introducing a host of new blessings for your abilities and weapons.
  • New blessings will be added for the previously existing Gods, too.
  • A new playable area arrives, introducing new enemies and bosses alongside it.
  • New room objectives will be added to make sure that no two runs are ever the same.
  • A revamped and expanded skill tree & streamlined matchmaking and quickplay options.
  • Crossplay will be available at launch across all platforms.
  • New sea shanties, the best way to build team camaraderie.

Alongside this free update comes the “Brinerot Pack,” which will feature a new suit, helmet, emote, and portrait frame to customize your Brinehunter with for $3.99.

Set in a unique brinepunk universe, Abyssus blends intense first-person shooter combat with roguelike progression systems, powerful weapon upgrades, and synergistic blessings that make every run different. Designed for cooperative play, the game emphasizes team synergy, build experimentation, and high-risk, high-reward combat encounters beneath the ocean’s surface.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Announce Trailer

“Brine Edition” Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/abyssus-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-this-summer-alongside-version-1-3-update
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Cozy narrative farming simulation game Delphinium announced for Xbox Series, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox Series

Due out in 2027.

Publisher Serenity Forge and developer CINNADEV have announced cozy narrative farming simulation game Delphinium for Xbox Series and PC (Steam, Microsoft Store). It will launch in 2027 with Xbox Play Anywhere support. It is playable for the first time this week behind closed doors at the ID@Xbox press event at Game Developers Conference 2026 in San Francisco.

Here is an overview of the game, via Serenity Forge:

About

High in the mountains lies a village for people with nowhere else to go. Population: nine.

Soon, it will be ten.

Haiyan never meant to come back. Years ago, she left this village to follow her older brother, a rising figure in a movement to rebuild their war-torn homeland. She never cared much for the cause, only for him.

When his ambitions finally caught up with him, he was executed. The movement collapsed. And the life Haiyan had built around him vanished overnight.

Months later, she wakes up back in the mountain village she once called home—grieving, directionless, and unsure who she is without the person she spent her life following.

Delphinium is a narrative-driven experience with farming elements. Tend crops, fish mountain streams, cook meals, and help restore a quiet village of outcasts, each carrying their own past.

As Haiyan forms relationships with the villagers, hidden connections between them unlock new conversations, conflicts, and choices that shape the story.

Over time, Haiyan must decide what kind of future she wants to build, whether to root herself in the fragile community growing around her, or leave the village behind and discover who she is on her own.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Story-Driven Rural Life – Planting seeds, preparing meals, and helping your neighbors aren’t side activities—they’re how Haiyan rebuilds her life. Every task deepens relationships and advances the unfolding narrative. The connections you nurture—or neglect—unlock new dialogue, shift alliances, and shape the direction of the story.
  • A Village Shaped by Connection and Conflict – Every villager carries their own regrets, rivalries, and hopes. Form bonds, uncover hidden links between characters, and decide whether to bring people together, or encourage independence, as the story branches.
  • Evolving Narrative – Your choices shape connections, unlock new story paths, and influence how Haiyan’s journey unfolds.
  • Expansive Crafting and Cooking – Discover and create over 200 recipes and craft furniture to personalize spaces around the village.
  • Engaging Minigames – Fishing, cleaning, and more are brought to life with charming, skill-based mechanics.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View a set of screenshots at the gallery.

Publisher Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/cozy-narrative-farming-simulation-game-delphinium-announced-for-xbox-series-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
